name: cto-sidebar
description: CTO agent chat — connects directly to your OpenClaw/ACP harness

cto.apiBase.description: OpenClaw gateway base URL. In-pod agent sidecars expose it at http://localhost:18789; for host debugging, port-forward the pod (kubectl -n cto port-forward svc/openclaw-coder 18789:18789).

cto.apiToken.description: Bearer token for the OpenClaw gateway (matches gateway.auth.token in /workspace/.openclaw/openclaw.json).

cto.defaultAgent.description: Default agent id (maps to model openclaw/<agent>). Leave empty to send model 'openclaw' and let the gateway auto-route.

cto.requestTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for the first streamed byte from the gateway before aborting.

cto.narrator.enabled.description: Enable the in-pod avatar narrator tile (Blaze voice + lipsync over WebRTC). Requires musetalk/hunyuan sidecars in the agent pod.

cto.narrator.musetalkUrl.description: Base URL for the MuseTalk narrator sidecar. In-pod default goes through the code-server localhost proxy at port 8081.

cto.narrator.hunyuanUrl.description: Base URL for the Hunyuan narrator sidecar. In-pod default goes through the code-server localhost proxy at port 8082.

cto.narrator.defaultBackend.description: Which lipsync backend to open the AvatarTile against by default. The UI segmented control can flip this live.
